blocks.text: Sidequest is a widely known application that allows you to 'sideload' third-party apps and modifications to your Quest.

blocks.name: Do I need a VR-ready PC?
blocks.value: No, it does not require a VR-ready PC to use, but does require a cable to connect your Quest to your PC (2.0 or 3.0) for the advanced functionality, if you want to install games without using a computer, you can also install it onto your headset however it's use is limited.

blocks.name: What does it hold?
blocks.value: Not only does it hold third-party apps, such as mods and fangames, you can also change your recording values, and install mods and apks directly to your headset via your PC.

blocks.name: How do I install it onto my Quest?
blocks.value: The folks at Sidequest have made a handy tutorial to help with this, please [watch it here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LhOJBTwJ-40)

blocks.name: Is it safe?
blocks.value: It is accepted (and even endorsed) by Meta and you can find information on how to install it [here](https://sidequestvr.com/setup-howto) with all setup instructions.
